content_body:
Welcome to Lake Blue Ridge Marina, nestled in the foothills at the gateway to the Blue Ridge Mountains.

This full-service marina and Blue Ridge boat rental company offers everything one needs to “get away from it all” and enjoy the aquamarine clear waters of Lake Blue Ridge. 

At the marina, you can rent a pontoon boat, canoe, kayak, paddle boat, and paddle board, or launch your own craft, gas up at the gas dock, or get your supplies for a great day on the lake at the store. Browse the showroom and pick out your favorite watercraft for a fun day out on the lake.
title: Lake Blue Ridge Marina
